capability.name: Geometry
capability.description: This capability contains requirements which relate to Geometry.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-topology
requirements.message: Mesh topology must be valid

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-primvar-indexing
requirements.message: Use indexed primvars when values are repeated

requirements.name: mesh-xform-positioning
requirements.message: Meshes should be positioned with xform ops rather than by "baking" transformations into point positions.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-transparent-is-watertight
requirements.message: Transparent physical bodies should be watertight to allow for simulation of light transmission and refraction.

requirements.name: usdgeom-extent
requirements.message: Boundable geometry primitives must have valid extent values.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-overlap
requirements.message: Meshes should not overlap unnecessarily

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-normals-exist
requirements.message: All non-subdivided meshes must have normals.

requirements.name: asset-origin-positioning
requirements.message: Geometry shall be defined as such that the asset is correctly positioned and oriented at the origin (0,0,0).

requirements.name: identical-mesh-consistency
requirements.message: Repeated occurrences of identically shaped objects should have identical mesh connectivity

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-primitive-tessellation
requirements.message: Avoid tessellating primitive shapes

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-subdivision
requirements.message: Use subdivision only when needed for smooth surfaces or displacement

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-zero-area
requirements.message: Faces should have non-zero area.

requirements.name: usdgeom-boundable-size
requirements.message: Meshes should maintain appropriate scale and boundary volumes

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-identical-timesamples
requirements.message: Use time samples only when attribute values change

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-primvar-usage
requirements.message: Only include primvars that are actively used

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-coincident
requirements.message: Meshes should not share the exact same space

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-tessellation-density
requirements.message: Use appropriate tessellation density for geometry

requirements.name: asset-pivot-placement
requirements.message: The pivot point of an asset should be positioned logically: at the center of the object's base for ground plane objects, and at the center of rotation for objects that rotate around specific points.

requirements.name: at-least-one-imageable-geometry
requirements.message: Assets must contain at least one Imageable Geometry

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-internal-geometry
requirements.message: Only include geometry that contributes to visualization or simulation

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-empty-spaces
requirements.message: Use efficient mesh boundaries for performance

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-unused-topology
requirements.message: Mesh topology should be without unused vertices, edges, or faces.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-normals-must-be-valid
requirements.message: Mesh normals values must be valid to produce correct shading.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-winding-order
requirements.message: The winding order of faces in a mesh must correctly represent the orientation (front/back) of the face.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-triangulation
requirements.message: Meshes must be triangulated for optimal rendering performance and compatibility when considering automatic collider creation (convex-hull, convex-decomposition, etc...). Triangulating mesh will provide predictable results versus n-gons.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-small
requirements.message: Combine small meshes into larger ones where appropriate

requirements.name: usdgeom-pointbased-points-precision
requirements.message: The values of `points` must not exceed the limit at which a given precision can be represented using 32-bit floats.

requirements.name: usdgeom-boundable-size-rtx-limit
requirements.message: World space bounds must not exceed RTX limit.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-manifold
requirements.message: Mesh geometry must be manifold

requirements.name: geom-shall-be-mesh
requirements.message: All geometry shall be represented as mesh primitives using the UsdGeomMesh schema. Curves, point clouds, implicit surfaces, procedural geometry, and other non-mesh representations are not supported in the current specification.

requirements.name: usdgeom-mesh-colocated-points
requirements.message: Each vertex position should be unique
